1.description: get Kristiansand kommunenummer and municipality geometry

2.description: get parcels (teig) in Kristiansand by kommunenummer

5.description: find parcels that intersect 200-year storm-surge areas (teig vs stormflo200ar)

6.description: from parcels that intersect storm surge, find those that also intersect flood zones (previous result vs flomareal)

7.description: collapse to one row per teig (unique parcels intersecting both hazards)

8.description: join back to full parcel records to get parcel attributes

args.sql:
SELECT f.omrade
FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna AS f
JOIN kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune AS k
  ON ST_Intersects(f.omrade, k.omrade)
WHERE k.kommunenummer = '4204';

args.sql:
SELECT ST_XMin(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS xmin,
       ST_YMin(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS ymin,
       ST_XMax(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS xmax,
       ST_YMax(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS ymax
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenummer = '4204';

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT teigid, kommunenummer, matrikkelnummertekst, representasjonspunkt, omrade
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig
WHERE kommunenummer = '4204';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT f.omrade
FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna AS f
JOIN kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune AS k
  ON ST_Intersects(f.omrade, k.omrade)
WHERE k.kommunenummer = '4204';

JOIN kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune AS k

WHERE k.kommunenummer = '4204';
